name: Akamai Technologies, Inc.
h1: Akamai Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Akamai Technologies runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Mumbai and Chennai, covering CoE and it, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Akamai Technologies office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Akamai Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Akamai Technologies runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai), covering CoE and it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Akamai Technologies's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Mumbai and Chennai, spanning CoE and it. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 39 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Akamai Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: Akamai Technologies operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Akamai Technologies have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Akamai Technologies's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Mumbai and Chennai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Akamai Technologies run in India?
faq.a: Akamai Technologies runs CoE and it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Akamai Technologies's India GCCs?
faq.a: Akamai Technologies's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Akamai Technologies's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 39 leaders at Akamai Technologies's India centers, across Finance, IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
